outputs: The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
Return path cannot be calculated while the route remembers you arriving.
Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
warnings: Where the command appears to answer a question not asked, attach the transcript to the nearest related form and do not ask the terminal to clarify itself.
The phrase “low-clearance” here means “safe to see”, not “useful to solve anything”.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
